heading: Use Cases
body:
You can use Atlas Data Federation to:

- Copy Atlas cluster data into Parquet or CSV (Comma-Separated Values) files written to
  AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) buckets or Azure Blob Storage.

- Query across multiple Atlas clusters and online archives to get a
  holistic view of your Atlas data.

- Materialize data from aggregations across Atlas clusters, AWS (Amazon Web Services)
  S3 (Simple Storage Service) buckets, and Azure Blob Storage.

- Read and import data from your AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) buckets or Azure Blob Storage into an Atlas
  cluster.
